title: Il mistero del tempio indiano
original_title: Kali Yug, il mistero del tempio indiano
overview: Doctor Palmer, wrongly accused of the murder of a British officer, is a prisoner of the Maharajah of Hasnabad. Doctor Palmer and Gopal, his devoted assistant, escape with the complicity of Amrita
